steps.t: Captured Longbeards can be found in Tûr Ágal, the tower in the centre of Caivád Sâr. Múta has discovered several Longbeards held captive in Tûr Ágal. …
Múta can be found in Tûr Ágal, the tower in the centre of Caivád Sâr. You have freed all of the captured Longbeards that you could find. You should re…
